title: EVA Gundam amalgam custom figure
wikitext:
[]: EVA-Gundam amalgam custom figure             Quote Post by muffinman123 » Sun Apr 28, 2013 4:47 am not sure if posted, but I just found this through random googling. then I searched the author's name on this site but couldn't find it, so I assume this hasn't been posted yet. http://www.gunjap.net/site/?p=125408 the white devil of EFSF the mod is mainly for the head and chest while the remaining parts only have minor modification from original, but the concept and the result look freaking badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Apr 28, 2013 5:00 am So awesome. Kind of reminds me off Unit-01 proposal illustration: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Apr 28, 2013 7:16 am Looks great.The colours are really fitting. EVA+Gundam=L.F.E

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sun Apr 28, 2013 7:17 am That poor Zaku =/

[]:             Quote Post by MoroNoKimi » Thu May 02, 2013 9:44 pm Nice crisp detail painting. Although it really kind of just looks like Gundam parts grafted onto an otherwise wholly Evangelion body (since the arms and legs aren't really modified at all.) I do like the diorama base.

[]:             Quote Post by red » Mon May 06, 2013 5:17 am Asuka's red one goes 3x faster!

Article: EVA Gundam amalgam custom figure
[]: EVA-Gundam amalgam custom figure             Quote Post by muffinman123 » Sun Apr 28, 2013 4:47 am not sure if posted, but I just found this through random googling. then I searched the author's name on this site but couldn't find it, so I assume this hasn't been posted yet. http://www.gunjap.net/site/?p=125408 the white devil of EFSF the mod is mainly for the head and chest while the remaining parts only have minor modification from original, but the concept and the result look freaking badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Apr 28, 2013 5:00 am So awesome. Kind of reminds me off Unit-01 proposal illustration: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Apr 28, 2013 7:16 am Looks great.The colours are really fitting. EVA+Gundam=L.F.E

[]:             Quote Post by MoroNoKimi » Thu May 02, 2013 9:44 pm Nice crisp detail painting. Although it really kind of just looks like Gundam parts grafted onto an otherwise wholly Evangelion body (since the arms and legs aren't really modified at all.) I do like the diorama base.
